Instructions: Please rate after every trial how the laser stimuli feel for you.
TaskDescription: In part 1 repeated stimuli with temperatures from 40 to maximum 59°C are applied on different skin sites. The subject then rates every stimulus pair with a scale from 0 (=not noticeable) over 50 (=pain threshold) to 100 (=unbearable).If the subject rates 100 before 59°C are reached, it is possible to stop the calibration at that point. In part 2 the files from part 1 can be selected A preliminary regression is done and temperatures corresponding to ratings of 50 and 90 are taken as limits. When 90 was not yet reached during the experiment, then our maximum temperature of 59°C is taken as upper limit.The limits are then used to define a range in which temperatures are tested pseudo-randomly. We apply 10 temperatures within that range, each of them twice.
Rating: Rating on scale from 0 to 100 with 50 being pain threshold
X1: X position on hand for laser stimulus 1 in mm starting from bottom left
Y1: Y position on hand for laser stimulus 1 in mm starting from bottom left
X2: X position on hand for laser stimulus 2 in mm starting from bottom left
Y2: Y position on hand for laser stimulus 2 in mm starting from bottom left
Experiment: Phase of task: Calibration part 1 or 2
Subject: Participant_ID
temp_65: Temperature that was calculated as target temperature based on Calibration part 2
